plugins.name: titon
plugins.description: AI-first interface for dapp authors building on the Titon network. Skills for Kronos automation (recurring on-chain jobs, TSA-audited — zero findings), Fortuna threshold-BLS VRF (verifiable randomness, TSA-audited — zero findings), Phoebe price oracle (BLS-attested merkle-root snapshots, TSA-audited — zero findings; consume verified prices with `fetchVerifiedPrice`), and Themis sealed-bid threshold-decryption (MEV-resistant intent execution, TSA-audited — zero findings; deploy a per-dapp chamber + write a Tolk RevealCallback consumer). Auto-loads the right recipe when your conversation matches. Kronos/Fortuna recipes ship in TypeScript + Python flavours; Phoebe + Themis are TypeScript today.
